mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ow_notification(no, user_id, content, link) VALUES(seq_ow_notification_no.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{content}, #{link})
mapper.select: SELECT no, user_id, content, link, is_read, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date FROM ow_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY no DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_notification SET is_read = 'Y' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 'N'
